title: [一人一信] 要求各地景點提供 「粵語導航」

replies.msg:
去旅行時成日會發覺audio guide
得 蝗語 比 簡支/繁支人,
有時連東南亞國家語言都有
但偏偏無廣東話
大家係時侯發揮連登力量，應該一人一封信send 去爭取

第一個目標： 大英博物館

電郵地址: info@britishmuseum.org

標題: A Hong Kongese request for Cantonese audio guide

內文:

Dear sir,

It is deploring and regrettable to learn British museum does not provide the audio guide with Cantonese version. As we all understand, London is a cosmopolitan and renowned city which comprises a large variety of culture. I consider British is equal to every traveler and their language, it is genial and warm to provide the audio guide in their own language.

Along with the past, uncountable and a load of people from Hong Kong, one of the most well-developed and affluent country in Asia, visited Britain for travelling. In terms of the fact that not only the Hong Kongese, but also the people from Guang Dong (China) as well as all over the world which containing 120 million people is utilizing Cantonese as mother tongues. It is extremely inconvenient and arduous for the Cantonese speaker to travel without audio guide – a dilemma for understanding the history of Britain.

I sincerely appreciate if you could additionally provide a Cantonese audio guide so that every Hong Kongese could wholly enjoy their trip in Britain. I am looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you very much.

Best Regards,
[你的名字]

第二個目標: 法國羅浮宮

電郵地址:info@louvre.fr

標題： A Hong Kongese request for Cantonese audio guide

內文

Dear sir,

It is deploring and regrettable to learn Louvre Museum does not provide the audio guide with Cantonese version. As we all understand, Paris is a cosmopolitan and renowned city which comprises a large variety of culture. I consider French is equal to every traveler and their language, it is genial and warm to provide the audio guide in their own language.

Along with the past, uncountable and a load of people from Hong Kong, one of the most well-developed and affluent country in Asia, visited France for travelling. In terms of the fact that not only the Hong Kongese, but also the people from Guang Dong (China) as well as all over the world which containing 120 million people is utilizing Cantonese as mother tongues. It is extremely inconvenient and arduous for the Cantonese speaker to travel without audio guide – a dilemma for understanding the history of France.

I sincerely appreciate if you could additionally provide a Cantonese audio guide so that every Hong Kongese could wholly enjoy their trip in Paris. I am looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you very much.

Best Regards,
[你的名字]
